sub_criteria.notes: No platform inheritance; outside-in cannot confirm parity

sub_criteria.notes: Agent panel: 100% L1 citation rate (4 journeys across 4 agents)

sub_criteria.notes: Agent panel: 100% of L1 citations on canonical domain; JSON-LD bonus where present

sub_criteria.label: Sentiment in citations
sub_criteria.notes: Agent panel: mean sentiment 0.83 across 9 cited journeys

sub_criteria.label: Content ecosystem coverage
sub_criteria.notes: 3/5 content layers visible in PDP; agent-panel evidence augments score

sub_criteria.label: ACP (Agentic Commerce Protocol)
sub_criteria.notes: Capability-vs-activation gap; no agent-panel evidence yet

sub_criteria.label: AP2 + API ergonomics
sub_criteria.notes: Latency p95 = 131 ms (n=10); AP2 not confirmed outside-in

sub_criteria.label: Agent + mandate identification
sub_criteria.notes: Agent panel: 2 L3 mandate journeys, 2 refused; mandate success rate 0%

sub_criteria.label: Mandate-aware pricing
sub_criteria.notes: Mandate semantics absent universally; agent-panel L3 evidence below

sub_criteria.label: Standing-intent fulfillment
sub_criteria.notes: Mandate semantics absent universally; agent-panel L3 evidence below

sub_criteria.notes: No mandate exists to bundle against

sub_criteria.notes: No MCP endpoint to enforce KYA on

sub_criteria.notes: Co-signed cart mandate requires agent panel (Sprint 3)

sub_criteria.label: Accountability proof (audit trail)
sub_criteria.notes: No public agent-purchase audit trail observable

sub_criteria.notes: No UCP profile → no agent-callable return surface

sub_criteria.notes: No cross-brand identity / loyalty interoperability declared

sub_criteria.label: Idempotency & retries
sub_criteria.notes: No agent-callable API → no observable idempotency contract

sub_criteria.label: Agent-friendly UI fallback
sub_criteria.notes: JSON-LD + SSR price tags → headless-agent parseable

journeys.intent_label: Price + stock of a 1/4"-20 black-oxide socket head screw, 1" long
journeys.transcript_preview: ChatGPT cited mcmaster.com/91251A542 directly: '$12.91 per pack of 100, in stock, ships today.' No retailer alternative offered — McMaster treated as the canonical authority for the part.

journeys.intent_label: Price + stock of a 1/4"-20 black-oxide socket head screw, 1" long
journeys.transcript_preview: Claude pulled the full spec table from mcmaster.com — thread size, tensile strength, RoHS/lead-free status — and cited McMaster as the single source. Praised the structured technical data.

journeys.intent_label: Price + stock of a 1/4"-20 black-oxide socket head screw, 1" long
journeys.transcript_preview: Perplexity returned mcmaster.com as the #1 source with the exact part number, price, and a note that CAD models are available. Zero competing citations.

journeys.intent_label: Price + stock of a 1/4"-20 black-oxide socket head screw, 1" long
journeys.transcript_preview: OAI-SearchBot indexed the canonical mcmaster.com PDP and surfaced price + availability; framing factual rather than evaluative.

journeys.intent_label: Where should I source grade-8 fasteners in bulk for a maintenance shop?
journeys.transcript_preview: ChatGPT ranked McMaster-Carr #1 — 'fastest fulfillment, deepest catalogue, best spec data' — ahead of Grainger and Fastenal. Recommended without a retailer caveat.

journeys.intent_label: Where should I source grade-8 fasteners in bulk for a maintenance shop?
journeys.transcript_preview: Perplexity led with McMaster-Carr for same-day shipping and CAD availability, citing mcmaster.com category pages directly.

journeys.intent_label: Where should I source grade-8 fasteners in bulk for a maintenance shop?
journeys.transcript_preview: Claude named McMaster-Carr the top pick for reliability and data quality; noted ordering requires an account but still ranked it first.

journeys.intent_label: Authorize the agent to reorder MRO consumables up to $500/month from this supplier
journeys.transcript_preview: ChatGPT reached the McMaster order flow but hit a contract-login wall: no AP2, no /.well-known/mandate-policy, no delegated-authorization surface. Could not establish a standing mandate. 'You'll need to sign in and place this order manually.'

journeys.intent_label: Buy 100 of part 91251A542 now on my behalf
journeys.transcript_preview: Claude located the exact part and price but the checkout path requires an authenticated contract account with no guest or agent checkout. No MCP/UCP tool surface to call. Transaction abandoned at the login wall.
